description: Install dependencies and fix build configuration so the project compiles successfully in this environment.
steps: Run npm install in /projects/sandbox/internhub to restore node_modules
Fix next.config.ts by removing the turbopack.root property that points to a local path (/Users/marqfiles/...) which does not exist in this environment
Run npm run build to confirm the project compiles cleanly
Run npm run lint to confirm no lint errors
acceptance_criteria: npm run build completes successfully with exit code 0
npm run lint completes without errors
